title: Continuous Internal Evaluation (CIE) Workflow for IoT Systems
description: A flowchart depicting the continuous cycle of data collection, analysis, feedback, and adaptation in an IoT system to maintain performance, security, and reliability.
relationships: Data flows from Sensors to Gateway for preprocessing
Gateway transmits aggregated data to Cloud Platform
Analytics Engine processes data to generate insights and detect anomalies
Insights trigger automated actions back to devices or alerts to Users
User feedback and new policies configure the system, restarting the cycle
